data.name: AppName
data.comment: App name shows as the title of the application.

data.name: SavePartition
data.comment: Tab title of feature saving a partition to the disk.

data.name: WritePartition
data.comment: Table title of feature write an image file to a partition.

data.name: LabelPartition
data.comment: A lable, identifying the combo box below is for select partition.

data.name: ReloadPartition
data.comment: A button to refresh partition table.

data.name: SaveButton
data.comment: A button to save partition to a file.

data.name: WriteButton
data.comment: A button to write a file content to a partition.

data.name: ErrorNoPartition
data.value: No partitions were found on your device.
data.comment: A error message to tell user no partition found on device.

data.name: LabelFileToSave
data.comment: A lable, identifying the textbox below is for select file to save.

data.name: LabelFileToFlash
data.comment: A lable, identifying the textbox below is for select file to read and write content to Partition.

data.name: LabelFormat
data.comment: A lable, identifying the radiobuttons below is for select format image to save.

data.name: BrowseButton
data.comment: A button to browse file on the disk.

data.name: FileTypeNameDiskImages
data.comment: File type name of disk images.

data.name: ConfirmFlashText
data.value: Are you sure to flash to a {0} partition {1}?
data.comment: A confirmation text to show before flash action. {0} is the size of the partition, and {1} is the partition name.

data.name: AppSubtitle
data.comment: Subtitle shown under the app title in the main window.

data.name: SectionNavigation
data.comment: Uppercase section label above the left-rail navigation list.

data.name: DialogButtonOk
data.comment: Primary button in the generic message dialog.

data.name: DialogButtonCancel
data.comment: Cancel button in the confirm dialog.

data.name: DialogButtonConfirm
data.comment: Primary button in the confirm dialog.

data.name: SectionSource
data.comment: Section label above the source partition selector on the Save tab.

data.name: SectionDestination
data.comment: Section label above the destination file picker on the Save tab.

data.name: SectionFormat
data.comment: Section label above the compression-format radio buttons.

data.name: SectionProgress
data.comment: Section label above the progress bar.

data.name: SectionTarget
data.comment: Section label above the target partition selector on the Flash tab.

data.name: SectionStatus
data.comment: Section label on the Logging tab.

data.name: TabLogging
data.comment: Tab header for the Logging tab (activity log + system info).

data.name: LoggingComingSoon
data.comment: Placeholder text on the Logging tab.

data.name: MenuFile
data.comment: Top-level native menu item.

data.name: MenuSavePartition
data.comment: Native menu entry that opens the Save Partition tab.

data.name: MenuFlashPartition
data.comment: Native menu entry that opens the Flash Partition tab.

data.name: MenuLogging
data.comment: Native menu entry that opens the Logging tab.

data.name: MenuReloadPartitions
data.comment: Native menu entry that reloads the partition list.

data.name: MenuAbout
data.comment: Native menu entry that shows the About dialog.

data.name: AboutDialogTitle
data.comment: Title of the About dialog.

data.name: AboutDialogFormat
data.comment: Body of the About dialog. {0} app name, {1} version, {2} subtitle.

data.name: SaveFileDialogTitle
data.comment: Title of the OS save-file picker.

data.name: ConfirmDialogTitle
data.comment: Title of the confirmation dialog shown before flashing.

data.name: ErrorPrivilegedHelperUnavailable
data.value: The privileged helper could not be reached. Make sure WinPartFlash was installed correctly so the helper binary lives next to the GUI.
data.comment: Shown when the macOS privileged helper binary is missing or fails to launch.

data.name: ErrorPrivilegedAuthorizationCancelled
data.value: Authorization was cancelled. The disk operation was not performed.
data.comment: Shown when the user dismisses the macOS administrator prompt.

data.name: ErrorPrivilegedAuthorizationFailed
data.comment: Shown when macOS rejects the elevation attempt; {0} is the underlying error.

data.name: ErrorDeviceBusy
data.value: The target device is in use. Try unmounting it from Finder or Disk Utility and try again.
data.comment: Shown when the raw block device cannot be opened because it is mounted or held by another process.

data.name: InfoPrivilegedFallbackInUse
data.value: Using the per-operation authorization fallback because the LaunchDaemon is not registered on this build.
data.comment: Diagnostic message shown when the SMAppService daemon path is unavailable and the GUI falls back to osascript.

data.name: SectionSystemInfo
data.comment: Section label above the system/environment readout on the Logging tab.

data.name: SectionActivityLog
data.comment: Section label above the activity log list on the Logging tab.

data.name: LabelAppVersion
data.comment: Row label in the system-info readout.

data.name: LabelRuntime
data.comment: Row label in the system-info readout for the .NET runtime version.

data.name: LabelOperatingSystem
data.comment: Row label in the system-info readout.

data.name: LabelNativeLibrary
data.comment: Row label in the system-info readout for the libWinPartFlashLib status.

data.name: LabelPrivilegedHelper
data.comment: Row label in the system-info readout for the macOS privileged helper status.

data.name: StatusAvailable
data.comment: System-info value indicating a component is present and reachable.

data.name: StatusUnavailable
data.comment: System-info value indicating a component is missing or could not be reached.

data.name: StatusNotApplicable
data.comment: System-info value for a component that doesn't apply to the current platform.

data.name: ButtonCopyLog
data.comment: Button that copies the activity log to the clipboard.

data.name: ButtonClearLog
data.comment: Button that clears the activity log.

data.name: LabelThroughput
data.comment: Label above the live bytes-per-second readout on the Save/Flash tabs.

data.name: LabelEta
data.comment: Label above the live estimated-time-remaining readout on the Save/Flash tabs.

data.name: LabelElapsed
data.comment: Label above the live elapsed-time readout on the Save/Flash tabs.

data.name: LogSaveStarted
data.comment: Activity-log entry emitted when a save operation begins. {0} partition name, {1} size, {2} destination file.

data.name: LogSaveCompleted
data.comment: Activity-log entry emitted when a save operation succeeds. {0} destination file, {1} elapsed duration.

data.name: LogFlashStarted
data.comment: Activity-log entry emitted when a flash operation begins. {0} source file, {1} partition name, {2} size.

data.name: LogFlashCompleted
data.comment: Activity-log entry emitted when a flash operation succeeds. {0} partition name, {1} elapsed duration.

data.name: LogOperationFailed
data.comment: Activity-log entry emitted when a save/flash operation throws. {0} is the error message.

data.name: LogChecksumSidecarWritten
data.comment: Activity-log entry after the .sha256 sidecar is saved. {0} sidecar filename, {1} hex digest.

data.name: LogChecksumSidecarFound
data.comment: Activity-log entry when a .sha256 sidecar is found next to a flash source. {0} sidecar filename.

data.name: LogChecksumVerified
data.comment: Activity-log entry after the streaming hash matched the sidecar during flash. {0} hex digest.

data.name: LogVerifyStarted
data.value: Verifying written data by re-reading the partition…
data.comment: Activity-log entry emitted at the start of verify-after-write.

data.name: LogVerifyCompleted
data.comment: Activity-log entry emitted after the read-back hash matched. {0} hex digest.

data.name: ErrorChecksumMismatch
data.value: Checksum mismatch against sidecar. Expected {0}, got {1}.
data.comment: Error when the streaming hash during flash does not match the sidecar. {0} expected hex, {1} actual hex.

data.name: ErrorVerifyMismatch
data.value: Verify-after-write mismatch. Written hash {0}, read-back hash {1}.
data.comment: Error when re-reading the partition produced a different hash than what was written. {0} written hex, {1} read-back hex.

data.name: LabelVerifyAfterWrite
data.comment: Checkbox on the Flash tab that enables re-reading the partition and comparing hashes.

data.name: SectionCompression
data.comment: Section label above the compression level / workers / probe controls on the Save tab.

data.name: LabelCompressionLevel
data.comment: Label for the compression level slider.

data.name: LabelCompressionWorkers
data.comment: Label for the zstd worker-thread count input. 0 disables multithreading.

data.name: ButtonProbeRatio
data.comment: Button that runs a compression ratio probe on a sample of the selected partition.

data.name: ProbeResultFormat
data.comment: Ratio probe result display. {0} raw sample size, {1} compressed size, {2} ratio (smaller is better), {3} elapsed duration.

data.name: ProbeResultRaw
data.comment: Probe result shown when the Raw format is selected.

data.name: LogProbeCompleted
data.value: Ratio probe: {0} sample compressed to {1} ({2:P1}) in {3}.
data.comment: Activity-log entry after a successful ratio probe. {0} sample size, {1} output size, {2} ratio, {3} elapsed.

data.name: LabelWholeDiskMode
data.comment: Checkbox that switches the partition picker to list whole disks instead of individual partitions.

data.name: LabelProtectSystemDisk
data.comment: Checkbox that hides the OS boot disk from the picker to prevent accidental overwrite.

data.name: LabelEjectAfterFlash
data.comment: Checkbox on the Flash tab that ejects the target disk after a successful flash.

data.name: LogEjectCompleted
data.comment: Activity-log entry after a successful post-flash eject. {0} device path.

data.name: LogEjectFailed
data.comment: Activity-log entry when the post-flash eject call fails. {0} device path, {1} error message.

data.name: TabInspect
data.comment: Tab header for the Inspect tab.

data.name: MenuInspect
data.comment: Native menu entry that opens the Inspect tab.

data.name: InspectSectionGpt
data.comment: Section label above the GPT viewer controls.

data.name: InspectSectionHex
data.comment: Section label above the hex peek controls.

data.name: InspectGptHint
data.value: Parses the GPT header and entries on the selected disk. Requires whole-disk mode or a whole-disk entry.
data.comment: Helper text describing the GPT viewer.

data.name: InspectHexHint
data.value: Reads a range from the selected partition (or disk) and shows a hex + ASCII dump.
data.comment: Helper text describing the hex peek tool.

data.name: InspectButtonScanGpt
data.comment: Button that triggers a GPT parse on the selected disk.

data.name: InspectButtonHexPeek
data.comment: Button that reads the configured range and renders a hex dump.

data.name: InspectHexOffset
data.comment: Label for the hex-peek offset input.

data.name: InspectHexLength
data.comment: Label for the hex-peek length input.

data.name: InspectSelectPartition
data.value: Select a partition above to inspect.
data.comment: Status shown on the Inspect tab when no partition is selected.

data.name: InspectGptNeedsDisk
data.value: GPT parsing needs a disk device — select a partition or enable whole-disk mode.
data.comment: Status shown when the selected entry has no backing disk device id.

data.name: InspectGptNotFound
data.value: No valid GPT found at LBA 1 with a 512B or 4096B sector size.
data.comment: Status shown when GPT parsing fails on the selected disk.

data.name: InspectGptScanDone
data.comment: Status shown after a successful GPT scan. {0} entry count.

data.name: InspectGptHeaderFormat
data.comment: Multi-line GPT header summary. {0} guid, {1} sector size, {2} first usable lba, {3} last usable lba, {4} entry count, {5} entry size.

data.name: InspectHexDone
data.comment: Status shown after a successful hex peek. {0} human-readable size, {1} offset.

data.name: InspectHexBadLength
data.comment: Validation error when the hex-peek length is non-positive.

data.name: InspectHexBadOffset
data.comment: Validation error when the hex-peek offset is negative.

data.name: InspectHexOffsetBeyondEnd
data.value: Offset is past the end of the stream.
data.comment: Error when the configured hex-peek offset exceeds the stream length.

data.name: InspectHexStreamNotSeekable
data.value: The selected stream does not support seeking.
data.comment: Error when asking for a non-zero offset on a non-seekable stream.

data.name: InspectLogGptScan
data.comment: Activity-log entry after a successful GPT scan. {0} device id, {1} entry count.

data.name: InspectLogHexPeek
data.value: Hex peek: {0} at offset {1}, read {2} bytes.
data.comment: Activity-log entry after a hex peek. {0} partition name, {1} offset, {2} bytes read.

data.name: PartitionNameWholeDisk
data.comment: Display name used in the partition picker for a whole-disk entry. {0} is the device path / identifier.

data.name: PartitionNameDiskPartition
data.comment: Display name used in the partition picker for a partition entry. {0} disk device path/identifier, {1} partition index or id, {2} volume/partition label.
